tasks.route_change_reason: Codex dependency must be reduced; Builder must become next pack author.

tasks.objective: Create canonical repository skeleton and genesis truth files for E-Factory Agent Builder.
Implement the self-build control core.
Implement the self-build execution substrate.
Build the serial self-build pack executor and prove it by self-running the next registered local execution pack.
Implement self-validation release gates through a registered self-build pack.
Implement formal intake for external agent specifications.
Implement external agent package generator.
Prove the factory by building the first real external agent package.
Replace proof-level external agent spec with production spec contract v1.
Upgrade the external agent package generator to a production blueprint v1.
Add reusable validation harness for generated agent packages.
Expose direct BUILD_EXTERNAL_AGENT mode in the Agent Builder orchestrator.
Prove production-grade factory build mode end to end.
Correct over-claimed production readiness and record the weaknesses that require hardening.
Replace generated agent runtime stubs with a real baseline request to result execution path.
Add a reusable operational validation harness for generated agent packages.
Upgrade BUILD_EXTERNAL_AGENT mode so that every generated package is operationally validated and emits a structured build report.
Prove that Agent Builder can produce an operational baseline external agent through BUILD_EXTERNAL_AGENT mode v2.
Build reusable Agent Spec Architect handoff that turns raw ideas into validated production external-agent specs.
Expose direct BUILD_FROM_RAW_IDEA mode that chains Agent Spec Architect handoff into external agent build.
Prove end-to-end raw idea to generated agent factory loop.
Build reusable specialization overlay resolver and prove audit_agent_v1 profile selection.
Expose direct BUILD_FROM_RAW_IDEA_SPECIALIZED mode that resolves and applies a specialization overlay.
Prove end-to-end raw idea to specialized generated agent factory loop.
Replace one-off specialization resolver branching with registry-backed specialization profile lookup.
Add and prove specification_agent_v1 as the second registry-backed specialization profile.
Prove two raw idea families route into distinct registry-backed specialization profiles.
Create reusable specialization gap contract and report writer module.
Modify BUILD_FROM_RAW_IDEA_SPECIALIZED so NO_MATCH writes structured diagnostic artifacts instead of throwing.
Prove unsupported raw idea families emit structured specialization gap diagnostics without crashing the factory.
Convert a real specialization gap artifact into a reusable specialization profile candidate brief.
Build and prove decision_support_agent_v1 from the canonical gap-driven profile candidate brief.
Prove the previously unsupported decision_support_agent raw idea now builds as a specialized agent.
Promote gap-to-profile candidate generation into a first-class orchestrator runtime mode.
Create a formal runtime report contract for gap-to-profile candidate intake.
Prove Builder runtime emits both candidate brief and intake report from a specialization gap report.
Make workflow_execution_agent reachable from real raw idea classification and prove runtime gap candidate intake.
Build and prove workflow_execution_agent_v1 from canonical runtime remediation intake artifacts.
Prove the exact workflow raw idea now closes from prior gap into a specialized PASS route.
Create a fresh real monitoring_agent gap family and prove candidate/intake generation before inline auto-intake integration.
Upgrade BUILD_FROM_RAW_IDEA_SPECIALIZED no-match runtime so one run emits gap, candidate, and intake artifacts.
Prove a real monitoring raw idea returns gap report, candidate, and intake in one specialized run.
Create a formal remediation program seed contract and generate a serial self-build closure seed from a valid inline remediation packet.
Upgrade specialized no-match runtime so one run emits remediation packet plus serial remediation program seed.
Prove a real monitoring raw idea emits gap, candidate, intake, and serial remediation program seed in one specialized run.
Consume the canonical monitoring remediation program seed and build monitoring_agent_v1 specialization profile with registry mapping and runtime validation.
Rerun the prior monitoring raw idea and prove it now resolves to monitoring_agent_v1 with specialized PASS output.
Prove the canonical remediation program seed was consumed into a real monitoring specialization closure loop.
Turn a canonical remediation program seed into a normalized serial self-build program blueprint contract.
Materialize a normalized remediation seed blueprint into a generated serial self-build program package.
Prove that one canonical remediation program seed can become a normalized blueprint and a materialized serial self-build program package.
Expose Agent Builder self-build through a manual GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch surface.
Upgrade generated external agent packages so they include a GitHub Actions launch delivery artifact and validator coverage.
Build one generated agent through the factory and prove the GitHub Actions launch delivery artifact is present and validator-enforced.
Prove the owner-visible self-build acceptance loop by consuming the PHASE54 repo-defined pack through the GitHub Action compatible self-build path.
Evaluate whether the materialized generated monitoring-agent self-build program is safely admissible into live Builder execution, without admitting it.
Materialize executable APPLY.ps1 entry scripts for the generated monitoring-agent self-build program without admitting it into live Builder execution.
Admit the executable monitoring_agent_v1 generated self-build program into live Builder execution without executing generated packs.
Generated remediation self-build task for semantic role derived from remediation program seed.
Generated remediation self-build task for semantic role derived from remediation program seed.
Generated remediation self-build task for semantic role derived from remediation program seed.
Define and prove program-owned execution recipe artifacts for the already-consumed monitoring_agent_v1 generated self-build program.
Refactor generated self-build executable materialization so APPLY.ps1 scripts are rendered from program-owned execution recipes while preserving the proven monitoring_agent_v1 behavior contour.

Generalize live admission so admission is driven by manifest-rooted program contracts rather than hardcoded fixture assumptions. Validate admissibility via contract validation on monitoring_agent_v1 without re-admission.

Define and prove remediation_intake_agent_v1 as a second generated self-build program family ready to enter the generalized generated-program materialization contour without materializing, admitting, or consuming it.
Materialize remediation_intake_agent_v1 from the second generated program family contract into a complete generated self-build program package without live admission or generated pack execution.
Admit remediation_intake_agent_v1 into live Builder execution using the generalized generated-program admission module without executing generated remediation packs.
Generated self-build task for remediation_intake_agent_v1 semantic role PROFILE_MATERIALIZATION declared by family contract.
Generated self-build task for remediation_intake_agent_v1 semantic role SPECIALIZED_CLOSURE_PROOF declared by family contract.
Generated self-build task for remediation_intake_agent_v1 semantic role SEED_CONSUMPTION_PROOF declared by family contract.
Prove the generated-family autonomous conveyor can execute exactly one generated-family trial pack through the live path and return the Builder queue to NONE.
Disposable generated-family conveyor live trial pack for PHASE65.
Prove the generated-family autonomous conveyor detects a controlled generated-pack failure, records failure evidence, and recovers the Builder queue to NONE without faking PASS.
Disposable generated-family conveyor failure trial pack for PHASE66 failure-recovery proof.
Produce the first standalone external remediation intake operator agent package through a terminal proof pack.
Add a GitHub Actions manual launch workflow for remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 through a Builder self-build pack.
Create a unified runtime catalog for accepted external agents and register remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 as the first catalog entry.
Create a standard input program format for future external-agent production and document remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 as the first example production program.
Read the first agent production PROGRAM.json and create a structured execution plan for producing an agent from that program.
Seed a Runbook Executor Agent v1 production program and prove Builder can read it into a production execution plan without creating the agent.
Produce Runbook Executor Agent v1 from the existing production program and execution plan, validate local runtime, and register it in the agent catalog pending GitHub Action launch.
Add GitHub Actions launch workflow for Runbook Executor Agent v1
Run GitHub Actions workflow for Runbook Executor Agent v1, verify artifact, and mark the agent accepted
Codify the closed-loop external-agent production path as the Builder factory standard.
Use Builder to produce Evidence Packager Agent v1 through the closed-loop standard and accept it after GitHub artifact validation.

tasks.purpose: Generate SELF_BUILD_PROGRAM_001 as a candidate program requiring admission before execution.
Execute generated admitted-action move and return queue to NONE

tasks.title: Self-growth intake from owner candidate: Codex archive boundary smoke checker
tasks.requested_action: Use existing Builder self-growth organs to adapt candidate into atom candidate, sandbox validate, prove, then accept or reject.
